variants.name: 霜害
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择两名存活玩家:他们死亡。如你以此法自杀，一名存活爪牙会变成霜害，然后你会变成一个不在场爪牙角色。黎明时公布死亡玩家后，所有玩家得知你昨晚选择了谁，然后在他们中投票选择一名:他复活。
variants.otherNightReminder: Choose two players to die. At dawn hold a vote to save 1 player. If Frostbite dies to their own ability, a Minion becomes Frostbite and they become an out of play Minion
variants.flavor: You'll understand the thin line between survival and surrender soon enough
